poshmark_desc:
🚨 GRAIL ALERT! 🚨 Elevate your streetwear game with this iconic Off-White Black Cotton Plant Arrows Logo Crewneck Sweatshirt! 🖤 Designed by the legendary Virgil Abloh, this unisex piece features the signature Arrows logo reimagined with a cool cotton plant motif. It's the perfect blend of luxury designer fashion and effortless street style. ✨

This crewneck is a statement piece that's super versatile! Pair it with your favorite distressed jeans and chunky sneakers for an edgy look, or layer it over a crisp tee for a more relaxed, modern vibe. Whether you're hitting the city or just chilling, this Off-White gem will keep you looking fresh. 🔥

In good pre-loved condition, ready for its next adventure! Minor signs of wear like some lint and creasing are present, but it just adds to that authentic, lived-in streetwear feel. 😉 Don't miss out on owning a piece of fashion history!

column25:
This authentic Off-White Cotton Flowers Arrows Logo Crewneck Sweatshirt represents a significant piece from the revered legacy of Virgil Abloh. Crafted from a comfortable cotton blend in classic black, it features the distinctive Arrows logo interwoven with a botanical flower graphic, a hallmark of the brand's luxury streetwear aesthetic. The garment is presented in good condition, suitable for its next discerning owner.

Detailed assessment reveals minor lint accumulation on the fabric, which is consistent with gentle wear, alongside faint marks visible on the black fabric specifically near the collar area. These details are carefully noted to ensure transparency and uphold the rigorous authentication standards of Vestiaire Collective. This unisex piece offers both iconic style and comfort.
